summary: Mobile native gestures feature (SwipeCarousel + PullToRefresh) verified successfully. All 11 test cases PASS. SwipeCarousel shows on mobile (<md breakpoint) for both homepage solutions and products page. Desktop correctly shows grid layouts with carousels hidden.

mobile_390px_homepage.carousel_cards_content: PASS - 4 solution cards with images, gold icons, titles, 'Explore' links
mobile_390px_homepage.peek_effect: PASS - Second card partially visible (40px peek width)

mobile_390px_products.carousel_cards_content: PASS - 9 product cards with images, 'Brands' badges, 'Browse' links

desktop_1920px.swipe_carousels_hidden: PASS - Solutions and Products SwipeCarousels hidden (md:hidden)
desktop_1920px.bento_grid_visible: PASS - Desktop bento grid layout visible (hidden md:grid)
desktop_1920px.products_grid_visible: PASS - 2-column product grid visible on desktop
desktop_1920px.cookie_consent_styling: PASS - Dark glass design with gold 'Accept All' button

features_verified: Mobile (390px): Homepage solutions section shows SwipeCarousel (data-testid='solutions-swipe-carousel') - PASS
Mobile (390px): Swipe carousel shows solution cards with images, gold icons, titles, 'Explore' links - PASS
Mobile (390px): Carousel progress bar with gold color and counter (1/4) visible - PASS
Mobile (390px): Second card partially visible (peek effect) encouraging swipe - PASS
Mobile (390px): Products page shows SwipeCarousel (data-testid='products-swipe-carousel') - PASS
Mobile (390px): Products carousel cards have images, 'Brands' badge, 'Browse' links - PASS
Mobile (390px): PullToRefresh component wraps main content (data-testid='pull-to-refresh') - PASS
Desktop (1920px): Swipe carousels are hidden, existing bento grid/grid layout shown - PASS
Desktop (1920px): No mobile tab bar visible - PASS
Desktop (1920px): Cookie consent shows dark glass design with gold 'Accept All' button - PASS
No console errors on homepage, products page, or solutions page - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: SwipeCarousel implementation uses framer-motion drag='x' with proper spring animations (stiffness: 300, damping: 30)
PullToRefresh uses native touch events with rubber-band effect (40% dampening) - threshold set to 80px
Both components dynamically imported with ssr:false for client-side only rendering
Responsive CSS pattern 'md:hidden' and 'hidden md:grid' correctly applied for mobile/desktop switching
Gold accent (#C9A962) consistently used for progress bar and active states
Card widths: 280px on homepage, 300px on products page with proper gap spacing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile native gestures (SwipeCarousel + PullToRefresh) fully implemented and verified. SwipeCarousel uses framer-motion drag with spring animations and gold progress bar (#C9A962). PullToRefresh uses touch events with 80px threshold. Both use ssr:false dynamic imports. Components show on mobile (<768px) via md:hidden class, hidden on desktop via hidden md:grid pattern. No console errors.
